meta.title: wintrover's resume
meta.description: Product engineer & builder shipping AI-powered products. Portfolio and project notes.
meta.keywords: Product Engineer, Builder, AI, Machine Learning, Computer Vision, LLM, NLP, Suhyok Yun
meta.og_description: Product engineer & builder shipping AI-powered products. Portfolio and project notes.

about_content:
Product engineer & builder focused on shipping end-to-end, AI-powered products.
With a background in Electrical and Electronic Engineering, I bridge engineering, UX, and business to turn ideas into usable software.
Through the Intel developer program and the projects below, I built LLM and computer vision systems, optimized performance, and deployed services to real users.
I care about fast iteration, reliable delivery, and customer-centered product decisions.

cvfactory.title: CVFactory
cvfactory.quote: SaaS service that automates the generation of customized cover letters using job posting web crawling, RAG, and LLM.
cvfactory.description:
- Frontend (CVFactory): Django-based UI development (job posting/story input, cover letter generation/editing).
- Backend (CVFactory Server): Web scraping based on Playwright/BeautifulSoup (asynchronous, iframe support).
- Asynchronous API and task processing based on FastAPI, Celery, Upstash Redis.
- RAG pipeline construction based on Langchain (Cohere Embeddings, FAISS, Groq LLM).

webkyc_process.title: WebKYC Process
webkyc_process.quote: An end-to-end system that automates and monitors KYC by analyzing ID images and selfie videos to compute face similarity.
webkyc_process.description:
- Designed and implemented a high-availability asynchronous KYC workflow engine using FastAPI and Temporal.
- Built a facial recognition pipeline using InsightFace and OpenCV, optimizing performance with GPU acceleration.
- Managed MariaDB modeling with SQLModel and declarative database migrations using Atlas.
- Established an API regression testing framework to ensure facial comparison reliability and reduce operational risks.
- Developed a React 19 admin dashboard and introduced browser-side video preprocessing with FFmpeg.wasm.

data_engineer_intern_task.title: Data Engineer Intern Position Task
data_engineer_intern_task.quote: Successfully completed the data engineer intern position task for AI startup by implementing Airflow-based ETL for site entity attributes.
data_engineer_intern_task.description:
Dynamic Category Detection: Real-time identification of 16 categories through API endpoints
- Data Collection and Processing: Automatic parsing of entity details from web responses
- Database Storage: Efficient PostgreSQL storage with duplicate handling capabilities
- Pipeline Orchestration: End-to-end workflow automation through Airflow

focc_inc.title: SMBholdings Inc.
focc_inc.caption: July 2025 - Present
focc_inc.description:
Designed and developed AI-based facial recognition KYC systems for Web3 fintech services (SMB Wallet, Mastercard Club).
Enhanced platform security by integrating AI models for secure identity verification and real-time authentication.
Designed and implemented robust security protocols for biometric data to ensure data integrity and user trust.
Led technical direction combining AI, Web3, and fintech to strengthen the company's core business model.

insight_marketing_labs.title: Insight Marketing Labs
insight_marketing_labs.caption: December 2022 - June 2024
insight_marketing_labs.description:
Led field sales and business development for an SEO startup, directly communicating with corporate clients.
Provided customized consulting solutions by deeply understanding customer requirements and pain points.
Achieved acquisition of 3 new corporate clients (15% annual revenue increase) and maintained over 85% contract renewal rate through effective problem-solving and relationship building, achieving significant business growth.

vizcam.title: VizCam
vizcam.caption: December 2020 - August 2022
vizcam.description:
Responsible for technical support and communication for machine vision software, serving as a key liaison between overseas engineers and domestic clients.
Enhanced technical understanding and problem-solving abilities by resolving complex technical issues.
Facilitated smooth communication through technical translation and real-time interpretation, effectively bridging the gap between technical and non-technical stakeholders to improve project efficiency (30% reduction in project duration, over 90% customer satisfaction).

intel_ai_for_future_workforce.title: Intel AI for Future Workforce
intel_ai_for_future_workforce.caption: October 2024 - April 2025
intel_ai_for_future_workforce.description:
Gained practical experience in AI and app development by mastering core technologies such as Python, PyTorch, and TensorFlow.
Developed deployable AI solutions through in-depth projects and hackathon participation,
Successfully led projects by mediating team conflicts and teaching GitHub usage, achieving successful solution deployment.

halla_university.title: Halla University
halla_university.sub_title: Bachelor's Degree in Electrical and Electronic Engineering
halla_university.caption: March 2013 - February 2020
halla_university.description:
Completed core theoretical and experimental education in electrical and electronic engineering.
Gained experience in C programming and ICT electronic component/product control using Arduino.
Developed practical skills through capstone design projects and multiple industry-academia collaboration programs.
